description: The main objective of this pipeline is to plot the incoming table(s). The pipeline starts with the node '9785559c-0cfd-4f33-a6e7-fe8f7d6753e4' which plots the tables, then it proceeds to the node '42317820-0054-4a3e-b5bd-7da6cba785f2' which converts the incoming image to RGB.

9785559c-0cfd-4f33-a6e7-fe8f7d6753e4.name: plot-table:plot-histogram
9785559c-0cfd-4f33-a6e7-fe8f7d6753e4.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Histogram plot.

42317820-0054-4a3e-b5bd-7da6cba785f2.name: ij1-color-to-rgb
42317820-0054-4a3e-b5bd-7da6cba785f2.description: Converts the incoming image to RGB. This applies the LUT if any is set. Compared to the image converter node, this operation renders the image into a representation equivalent to an image viewer, meaning that contrast settings are preserved.
